      • Class viewAndControl.GameDescriptionPanel

        class GameDescriptionPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • categoriesLabel
            JLabel categoriesLabel
            Displays the game's categories.
          • currentGame
            Game currentGame
            The game currently being displayed. Updated via setDisplayedGame.
          • description
            JTextArea description
            Displays the game description.
          • holderGameDB
            GameDatabase holderGameDB
            Placeholder for data.GameDatabase ( used for file scanner)
          • imageLabel
            JLabel imageLabel
            Displays the game's cover image.
          • mechanicsLabel
            JLabel mechanicsLabel
            Displays the game's mechanics.
          • nameLabel
            JLabel nameLabel
            Displays the game name.
          • playerLabel
            JLabel playerLabel
            Displays the player count range.
          • ratingButtons
            JRadioButton[] ratingButtons
            Stores the 5 rating radio buttons so they can be looped over on save.
          • reviewList
            JList<Review> reviewList
            Displays the list of reviews for the current game.
          • yearLabel
            JLabel yearLabel
            Displays the year the game was published.
